requirements: signal-cli HTTP daemon, phone number, allowlist

setup.tryIt: Send a Signal DM to the linked phone number.
setup.summary: Signal connects through a signal-cli HTTP daemon that is already linked to a Signal phone number.
steps: Install signal-cli-rest-api and link or register a Signal number.
Enter the daemon host, port, and linked phone number.
Save and enable Signal, then send a direct test message.

phoneNumber.label: Phone number
phoneNumber.help: Use the Signal number registered with signal-cli.
